node.statement: POLARISATION => the contract. h_{a,b}=a∘b-P(a∘b)=-q_{a,b} (GT-hyp/def-square-hole) is symmetric bilinear in (a,b), with diagonal h_{a,a}=-q_a, so ||h_{a,a}||=||q_a||<=C(eta/lambda)||a||^2 (1.5). For t>0, h_{a,b}=(1/(4t))(h_{a+tb,a+tb}-h_{a-tb,a-tb}). Hence ||h_{a,b}|| <= (1/(4t))(||q_{a+tb}||+||q_{a-tb}||) <= (C eta/(4 t lambda))(||a+tb||^2+||a-tb||^2) <= (C eta/(2 t lambda))(||a||+t||b||)^2 (triangle inequality on the norm). For a,b!=0 choose t=||a||/||b||: (||a||+t||b||)^2=4||a||^2 and 1/(2t)=||b||/(2||a||), giving ||h_{a,b}|| <= C(eta/lambda)||a|| ||b|| (the zero cases are trivial). This is the contract.
